isi.lyrics_timestamp:
[Intro]
I know I said we weren't going to keep doing this, but
There's just something 'bout you

[Verse 1]
Something 'bout you, brown eyed girl
Move your body, I'll give it to you, uh
Yeah, you got me crazy, girl
Leaving nothing but a minute with you, oh

[Pre-Chorus]
Maybe I should've stayed with you tonight
Running my patience, I gave all I got
Something keeps pulling me right back

[Chorus]
Baby, don't hold it
Keep it movin', I'll be right next to you
Don't hold it
Can't wait, baby, don't hold it
Baby, I can't wait
Let's go right now, what you waiting for
Oh
Sorry that I can't hold it back

[Verse 2]
Move around the city, I'll let your body tease me
Yeah, take it slow, everything is yours now
Feel so right, it's going down so bad
Feel the motion running through my mind, yeah
I know I'll be great for you
Girl, so complicated
You know you drive me crazy
Trippin', chasin' for you, girl

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh, no, I should've been running to you
Running my patience, I gave you my pride
Something keeps pulling me right back

[Chorus]
Baby, don't hold it (Okay)
Keep it movin', I'll be right next to you
Don't hold it (Oh)
Can't wait, baby, don't hold it
Baby, I can't wait
Let's go right now, what you waiting for (Hey)
Oh
Sorry that I can't hold it back

[Post-Chorus]
Uh, uh
Can't wait, baby don't hold it
Uh, uh
Sorry that I can't hold it back
